source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/06_인허가 조사 및 보고자료/(완) 230804 - X-ray system(Floor Mounted DR) 제조시 필요인증/FDR Smart Brochure(X-ray with DR).pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Brochure/specification text for the Fujifilm FDR Smart floor-mounted digital X-ray system and related detector, generator, table, tube stand, and wall stand features.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports product and technical specification wiki facts; the supplied text does not state a regulatory approval, certification, authority, or jurisdiction.
keyPoints: FDR Smart is described as an elegant and economical digital X-ray system for medium sized X-ray departments.
The system requires only a 3 m x 2 m X-ray room and can be ordered with three generator types based on facility power supply and power stability.
The brochure lists generator model options including capacitor, UPS, and line powered types from 40 kW to 82 kW.
ISS technology places the TFT sensor in front of the scintillation layer and is described as permitting higher resolution images and reduced doses.
Wireless FPD D-EVO is described as enabling a wide range of free exposure positions.

evidence.claim: FDR Smart is described as an elegant and economical digital X-ray system.
FDR Smart is positioned for medium sized X-ray departments.
evidence.evidenceText: Perfect for the medium sized X ray department.

evidence.claim: FDR Smart requires only a 3 m x 2 m X-ray room.
evidence.evidenceText: FDR SMART requires only a 3 m x 2m X ray room

evidence.claim: FDR Smart can be ordered in three generator types based on existing facility power supply and power stability.
evidence.evidenceText: can be ordered in 3 different types of generators due to the already existing power supply in the facility and based on the stability of power supply given in the area.

evidence.claim: The capacitor assisted generator supplies power for five hours or approximately 500 shots without electricity.
evidence.evidenceText: Supplies power for 5 hours (or approximately 500 shots) without electricity.

evidence.claim: The generator options include GXR-C40S capacitor type rated 40 kW.
The generator options include GXR-U40S UPS type rated 40 kW.
The generator options include line powered GXR-40S, GXR-52S, GXR-68S, and GXR-82S models.
evidence.evidenceText: GXR-40S Line 52kW ... GXR-52S Line 68kW ... GXR-68S Line 82kW ... GXR-82S Line

evidence.claim: The table maximum patient weight is 300 kg.
ISS technology places the TFT sensor in front of the scintillation layer instead of behind it.
evidence.evidenceText: “ISS technology” sees the TFT sensor placed in front of the scintillation layer instead of its traditional position behind it.

evidence.claim: ISS technology is described as permitting higher resolution images and reduced doses.
evidence.evidenceText: This technology permits a higher resolution image and reduced doses.

evidence.claim: The novel CsI:Tl FPD with adhesively coupled structure and ISS method is described as improving image quality and reducing patient X-ray exposure.
evidence.evidenceText: The novel type CsI:TI FPD, combining an adhesively coupled structure with ISS method, exhibits significant improvement in image quality than conventional CsI:TI FPDs and provides a way to reduce X-ray exposure to the patient.

evidence.claim: The preview image display time after exposure is one second.
evidence.evidenceText: It just takes one second to display the preview image after an exposure

evidence.claim: The minimum inter-exposure time is eight seconds.
evidence.evidenceText: the inter-exposure time in a minimum of 8 seconds.

evidence.claim: Wireless mode is described as freeing X-ray procedures from cabling and improving operability.
evidence.evidenceText: The wireless mode frees X-ray procedures from bothersome cabling, resulting in greater operability.

evidence.claim: FDR Smart with wireless FPD D-EVO enables a wide range of free exposure positions.
evidence.evidenceText: FDR Smart with wireless FPD D-EVO enables a wide range of free exposure positions

evidence.claim: Fujifilm image processing technology automatically recognizes the region of interest and applies optimum image processing parameters.
evidence.evidenceText: Fujifilm’s image processing technology automatically recognizes the region of interest and applies the optimum image processing parameters

Source metadata authoritySignal is FDA, but the supplied source text does not mention FDA, a jurisdiction, approval, certification, or regulatory authority.

Text appears OCR-extracted with quality issues and duplicated or garbled words such as 'Technology echnology', 'R ttt iititi', and inconsistent 'Cassete/Cassette' spelling.
